      "text": "Un tee bija tur pee Dah-

"

      "n": 40,

      "text": "Ir tee/ kas tuwaki pee

"

    {
      "n": 1,

      "text": "N Dahwids turreja

nehm/ un ar wiﬀeem Leeleem-
Kungeem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un Dahwids tazzija us
wiﬀu Israēta Draudsī: Ja juhs
schkeetat labbu efjam/ un ja tas
no ta KUNGA mubfin Deewa
irr/ tad fuhtifim mehs wiﬀur
apkaht pee muhfeem zitteem
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Brahkeem / wiﬀas Israēta
Walsts/ un pee teem Preeste-
reem un Lewiteem/ kas pee teem

"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un atweddisim pee mums

"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad fazzija wiﬀa Drau-

"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tapulzinaja Dahwids

"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad zehlehs Dahwids ar

"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee wedde to Deewa

Rattus.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 8,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Dahwids un wiﬀs I-

scheein/ un ar Trummnetehin.
"

      "text": "Bet kad tee ithds Ridona
